action.content: Write a song about innovation with a positive tone that is appealing to teenagers. Put your entire response in double quotation marks.
action.label: context

action.content:
"Future's in Our Hands"
(Verse 1)
We're waking up to a brand new day,
The world is changing fast and we're ready to play.
No more rules that say "don't touch,"
We're the ones who'll make the tech go.
From the smart phone to the robot,
We're building the future, we're not stopping.
It's not about following the old ways,
It's about taking the leap and saying "yes."

(Chorus)
So grab your tools, let's get to work,
Innovation's the only way to grow.
We're breaking the mold, we're rewriting the code,
The future's bright, it's time to go.
With a positive spin and a bright outlook,
We're the innovators, we're the future's got.

(Verse 2)
Think about the apps that you use,
The games that you play, the stuff that you do.
It's all possible when you think outside the box,
When you're ready to create, you're not lost.
The world is waiting for your ideas,
The future's waiting for your ideas.
So don't be afraid to try something new,
The best ideas come from the best of you.

(Chorus)
So grab your tools, let's get to work,
Innovation's the only way to grow.
We're breaking the mold, we're rewriting the code,
The future's bright, it's time to go.
With a positive spin and a bright outlook,
We're the innovators, we're the future's got.

(Bridge)
It's not about being perfect,
It's about being bold and brave.
The best ideas come from the best of you,
So let's make the future, we're the innovators.

(Chorus)
So grab your tools, let's get to work,
Innovation's the only way to grow.
We're breaking the mold, we're rewriting the code,
The future's bright, it's time to go.
With a positive spin and a bright outlook,
We're the innovators, we're the future's got.

(Outro)
Yeah, we're the innovators,
We're the future's got.
So let's make the future, we're the innovators.
action.label: response
